breakdown: This PR ports CR (CodeRabbit) fallback logic to Skeptic Gates workflow files. It adds robust error handling with exit code capture via set +e -o pipefail, falls back to status+comment detection when formal reviews aren't available, and handles both coderabbitai[bot] and coderabbitai user logins. High error handling quality but score penalized by lack of test files and shell scripting having no type safety concept.
key_changes: Added error handling with set +e -o pipefail and exit code capture (LATEST_CR_EXIT, CR_APPROVE_EXIT)
Added fallback logic: when no formal CR review exists, check CodeRabbit status + [approve] comment
Expanded user.login filter to include both 'coderabbitai[bot]' and 'coderabbitai'
Changed regex from strict '\\s*\\[approve\\]\\s*$' to simpler '\\[approve\\]' for comment matching
Modified CR status filter to include all states (not just 'success') before falling back to comment check
